rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Living announced the launch of a new online shopping platform. The platform aims to enhance the shopping experience for consumers in Qatar.
changes_summary: Removed casual and hype language ('SUPER excited', 'game-changing', 'revolutionize', 'mind-blowing', 'unprecedented', 'must-see').
Replaced first-person with entity-first sentence ('Qatar Living announced').
Toned down claims to be factual and formal.
